rationale: Review 1's only naming-relevant finding (the `includeRight` docstring/namespace claiming 'Hopf algebra' while the signature requires only `[Algebra k A]`) is real but minor and contested — organizing a general definition inside a Hopf-algebra context file is common practice and all fix options carry tradeoffs. Findings 2–3 target `@[simp]` usage, not naming, so acting on either review leaves the PR essentially equivalent from a naming standpoint.
